ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

lc_check.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number 'SEG-26D-467121' does not contain an LC reference in a banking context. Standard verification applies.

pairing_validation.motivation: All three pairing criteria are met: (1) Certificate references invoice 260368 dated 2026-02-17, which matches the invoice number and date exactly. (2) Consignor 'Hammar Maskin AB' is identifiable in the invoice footer. (3) Consignee 'HAMMAR MASKIN (M) SDN BHD' is identifiable as both delivery and invoice address in the invoice.

consignor.certificate_value: Hammar Maskin AB, Buagärde 36, 517 95, Olsfors, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: Hammar Maskin AB, Buagärde 36, SE-517 95 Olsfors, Sweden (footer)

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name 'Hammar Maskin AB' anywhere in invoice documents
comparison_steps.detail: Consignor name 'Hammar Maskin AB' found in invoice footer on page 1 and page 2: 'Hammar Maskin AB Buagärde 36 SE-517 95 Olsfors, Sweden'. Also identified via HAMMAR branding/logo in header.

comparison_steps.description: Verify that the legal entity name matches
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate: 'Hammar Maskin AB'. Invoice footer: 'Hammar Maskin AB'. Exact match after normalization.
Certificate states 'Sweden'. Invoice footer states 'Sweden' explicitly. Additionally VAT no. 'SE556282502501' has SE prefix confirming Sweden. IBAN 'SE1780000803250032941445' confirms Sweden.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found in invoice footer/header
Country verification via explicit text and VAT prefix

consignor.debug_explanation: Certifikatets consignor 'Hammar Maskin AB' med adress 'Buagärde 36, 517 95, Olsfors, Sweden' identifierades exakt i fakturans footer: 'Hammar Maskin AB Buagärde 36 SE-517 95 Olsfors, Sweden'. Fakturan är utställd av Hammar Maskin AB (branding i header, fullständiga företagsuppgifter i footer). Land 'Sweden' bekräftas av explicit text i footer, VAT-prefix SE och IBAN-prefix SE. Regel 4.1.0 (koncernstruktur) ger direkt MATCH eftersom consignor-namnet återfinns uttryckligen i fakturan.

consignee.certificate_value: HAMMAR MASKIN (M) SDN BHD, No 41, LEBUH SULTAN MOHAMED 1, KU 18, Tmn Perindustrian B.S.S, 42000 POT KLANG SELANGOR D.E, MALAYSIA
consignee.invoice_value: Hammar Maskin (M) Sdn Bhd, No 41,Lebuh Sultan Mohamed 1/, KU 18, Tmn Perindustrian B.S.S, 42000 Port Klang Selangor D.E, MALAYSIA (Invoice address)

comparison_steps.description: Identify primary billing field in invoice
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice has an explicit 'Invoice address' field with 'Hammar Maskin (M) Sdn Bhd' at the same address. This is the primary billing/factoring field.
Certificate: 'HAMMAR MASKIN (M) SDN BHD'. Invoice address: 'Hammar Maskin (M) Sdn Bhd'. After case normalization: identical. 'SDN BHD' is an accepted legal form abbreviation (Sendirian Berhad).

Certificate says 'POT KLANG', invoice says 'Port Klang'. This is a minor spelling variation (POT vs Port) which does not affect MATCH/MISMATCH per rule 4.2.4 — address differences do not medföra MISMATCH when name and country match.

rules_applied.description: Invoice address (primary billing field) used for consignee verification
Name verification after normalization – exact match
Address differences do not cause MISMATCH when name and country match

consignee.debug_explanation: Certifikatets consignee 'HAMMAR MASKIN (M) SDN BHD' identifierades i fakturans 'Invoice address'-fält som 'Hammar Maskin (M) Sdn Bhd'. Efter normalisering av versaler/gemener är namnen identiska. Land 'MALAYSIA' anges explicit i båda dokumenten. En mindre stavningsvariation 'POT KLANG' vs 'Port Klang' i adressen påverkar inte bedömningen enligt regel 4.2.4.

goods_description.certificate_value: HAMMAR CRANE KIT / 1 UNIT HAMMAR 119 HS CRANE KIT WITH ID.NR #251812A19# & #251812B11# COMPLETE WITH ACCESSORIES / See attached invoice 260368 dated 2026-02-17
goods_description.invoice_value: Crane kit / Hammar 119 HS / VIN CODE: #251812A19# & #251812B11# / COMPLETE WITH ACCESSORIES / Product record: YT919S251T8002120

comparison_steps.description: Certificate contains explicit invoice reference 'See attached invoice 260368 dated 2026-02-17'
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate explicitly references invoice 260368 dated 2026-02-17. Invoice confirms number 260368 and date 2026-02-17. Reference matches exactly.

comparison_steps.description: Verify that invoice content is consistent with certificate description
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate describes 'HAMMAR CRANE KIT / HAMMAR 119 HS CRANE KIT'. Invoice line 10 describes 'Crane kit' with detail 'Hammar 119 HS'. The identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'HAMMAR 119 HS CRANE KIT' can be identified in invoice (Name: 'Crane kit', Detail: 'Hammar 119 HS'). VIN codes match: '#251812A19# & #251812B11#' in both documents. Product record YT919S251T8002120 matches. 'COMPLETE WITH ACCESSORIES' present in both.

Certificate: 'HAMMAR 119 HS CRANE KIT'. Invoice: 'Crane kit' (name) + 'Hammar 119 HS' (detail). All identity-bearing words present: HAMMAR, 119, HS, CRANE, KIT. VIN codes #251812A19# and #251812B11# found in both documents.

rules_applied.description: Generell varubeskrivning med fakturareferens – certificate references invoice 260368 dated 2026-02-17, exact match confirmed
Identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'HAMMAR 119 HS CRANE KIT' identifiable in invoice

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certifikatet innehåller uttrycklig hänvisning 'See attached invoice 260368 dated 2026-02-17'. Fakturanumret 260368 och datumet 2026-02-17 överensstämmer exakt med fakturan. Enligt regel 4.3.5 anses varubeskrivningen verifierad via fakturareferens. Supplementär textmatchning bekräftar: 'HAMMAR 119 HS CRANE KIT' identifieras i fakturan som 'Crane kit' med detalj 'Hammar 119 HS'. VIN-koder (#251812A19# & #251812B11#) och Product record (YT919S251T8002120) överensstämmer exakt. 'COMPLETE WITH ACCESSORIES' finns i båda dokumenten.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Year of manufacturing discrepancy: Certificate states 2026, invoice states 2025
rejected_hypotheses.reason: Year of manufacturing is not part of the identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning and not a verifiable field under rule 4.3. This is additional descriptive information, not a product identity element. It does not affect MATCH/MISMATCH for goods description.

comparison_steps.detail: Three quantity entries identified in Box 7: numeric quantity '1', gross weight 4810 kg, net weight 4810 kg.
Invoice Pos. 10 Qty: '1,00 pcs'. Numeric value 1 confirmed.
Invoice Pos. 10 detail line: 'Weight 4810 kg'. Numeric value 4810 and unit kg confirmed. Certificate states both G.Weight and N.Weight as 4810 kg.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states both GW and NW as 4810 kg. Invoice states 'Weight 4810 kg' without GW/NW specification.
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate GW = 4810 kg, NW = 4810 kg (identical values). Invoice: 'Weight 4810 kg'. Since both GW and NW are the same value (4810 kg) and the invoice confirms 4810 kg, there is no ambiguity – the value matches regardless of weight category. Per 4.4.3.1, at least one quantity must be verifiable: numeric '1' matches '1,00 pcs', and weight '4810 kg' matches 'Weight 4810 kg'. No contradictory values in invoice.

rules_applied.description: Förekomstkontroll – numeric value 1 identified in invoice as '1,00 pcs'
Förekomstkontroll – weight value 4810 kg identified in invoice as 'Weight 4810 kg'
Multiple quantity entries – at least one verified (both verified here)
Weight category – GW and NW identical (4810 kg), invoice confirms 4810 kg, no contradiction

quantity.debug_explanation: Certifikatet anger tre kvantitetsuppgifter i Box 7: '1' (styck), 'G.Weight 4810 kg' och 'N.Weight 4810 kg'. Fakturan anger Qty '1,00 pcs' och 'Weight 4810 kg'. Det numeriska värdet 1 kan identifieras i fakturan (1,00 pcs). Viktvärdet 4810 kg kan identifieras i fakturan ('Weight 4810 kg'). Eftersom certifikatets GW och NW båda är 4810 kg (identiska) och fakturan bekräftar 4810 kg utan motstridande alternativt viktvärde, föreligger ingen tvetydighet. Enligt 4.4.3.1 räcker det att minst en kvantitetsuppgift verifieras — här är samtliga verifierade.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Invoice 'Weight 4810 kg' lacks GW/NW specification which might create ambiguity
rejected_hypotheses.reason: Per rule 4.4.2.2 point 2-3: Certificate states both GW and NW as the same value (4810 kg). Since GW = NW = 4810, there is no ambiguity about which weight category the invoice's 4810 kg refers to — it matches both. No contradictory alternative value exists in the invoice.

comparison_steps.description: Search for explicit origin field in invoice
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice page 2 contains explicit field: 'Country of origin: Sweden'
Certificate: 'SWEDEN'. Invoice: 'Sweden'. After case normalization: identical.

rules_applied.description: Explicit 'Country of origin' field found in invoice page 2

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certifikatets Box 3 anger ursprungsland 'SWEDEN'. Fakturan anger på sida 2 uttryckligen 'Country of origin: Sweden'. Efter normalisering av versaler/gemener: identiskt. Ursprungslandet är entydigt verifierat via ett explicit origin-fält i fakturan.

rule_evaluation_log.detail: No Letter of Credit reference found in certificate.
Document A identified as certificate (Certificate of Origin), Document B identified as invoice (Invoice - 260368). Clear role separation.
All three criteria met: invoice reference 260368 matches, consignor 'Hammar Maskin AB' found in invoice footer, consignee 'Hammar Maskin (M) Sdn Bhd' found in invoice address.
Consignor 'Hammar Maskin AB' found in invoice footer on both pages.
Exact match: 'Hammar Maskin AB' in both documents.
Sweden confirmed via explicit text, SE VAT prefix, SE IBAN prefix.
Invoice address field identified as primary billing field containing 'Hammar Maskin (M) Sdn Bhd'.
Certificate references 'invoice 260368 dated 2026-02-17'. Invoice confirms number 260368 and date 2026-02-17. Invoice content (Crane kit, Hammar 119 HS) is consistent with certificate description.
'HAMMAR 119 HS CRANE KIT' identifiable in invoice.
Certificate 'G.Weight 4810 kg / N.Weight 4810 kg' → Invoice 'Weight 4810 kg'.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Multiple quantity entries – at least one verified
rule_evaluation_log.detail: All three quantity entries verified: numeric 1, GW 4810 kg, NW 4810 kg.
Explicit 'Country of origin: Sweden' on invoice page 2.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Samtliga kontrollpunkter stämmer överens mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Avsändaren Hammar Maskin AB i Sverige identifieras i fakturan, mottagaren Hammar Maskin (M) Sdn Bhd i Malaysia bekräftas i fakturans adressfält, varubeskrivningen Hammar 119 HS Crane Kit verifieras via fakturareferens och textmatchning, kvantitet och vikt (1 styck, 4810 kg) överensstämmer, och ursprungsland Sverige anges explicit i båda dokumenten. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.

warnings.description: Minor discrepancy in year of manufacturing: certificate states 2026, invoice states 2025. This is not a verification point under the rules and does not affect the decision.
Minor address spelling variation: certificate 'POT KLANG' vs invoice 'Port Klang'. Per rule 4.2.4, address differences do not affect MATCH when name and country match.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura
human_readable_report.summary: Alla kontrollpunkter ger MATCH. Certifikatets uppgifter kan verifieras mot fakturan. Rekommendation: automatiskt godkännande.

sections.motivation: Certifikatet innehåller uttrycklig hänvisning 'See attached invoice 260368 dated 2026-02-17' som exakt överensstämmer med fakturans nummer och datum. sections.motivation: Certifikatets kvantitetsuppgifter (1 styck, GW 4810 kg, NW 4810 kg) identifieras i fakturan (1,00 pcs, Weight 4810 kg). Eftersom GW och NW är identiska (4810 kg) och fakturan bekräftar 4810 kg utan motstridande alternativvärde, föreligger ingen tvetydighet. MATCH.

sections.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'SWEDEN' (Box 3) identifieras uttryckligen i fakturan som 'Country of origin: Sweden' på sida 2. Exakt matchning efter normalisering av versaler/gemener. MATCH.

output_quality_checks.consistency_detail: All 5 applicable checkpoints have status MATCH. comparison_result is IDENTICAL. workflow_recommendation is AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE. All motivations are consistent with their respective status values. No MISMATCH found, no MANUAL_REVIEW needed.
output_quality_checks.confidence_floor_detail: All applicable checkpoints have confidence >= 0.85 (min: 0.96). IDENTICAL result is valid.
